message:
fix(core): handle PolledAfterCompletion semaphore error in pool and runtime_compat

runtime_compat.rs: Add AcquireError::PolledAfterCompletion variant
mapping from asupersync::sync::AcquireError::PolledAfterCompletion,
with Display impl.

pool.rs: Map PolledAfterCompletion to PoolError::Cancelled in the
pool acquire path — treating misuse of a completed acquire future
the same as a cancelled acquire at the pool boundary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
